summary: Iteration 19: Phase 3 Autonomous AI Modules testing complete. All 53 tests passed. Seven autonomous modules wired to API routes: guardrails, sandbox, validation_loop, snapshot_manager, context_pruning, dependency_graph, feedback_collector. All 18 autonomous endpoints under /api/autonomous/* verified working.
passed_tests: GET /api/health - health check returns healthy status (regression)
POST /api/auth/login - user login returns JWT tokens (regression)
POST /api/autonomous/guardrails/validate - detects lazy code patterns (TODO, NotImplementedError)
POST /api/autonomous/guardrails/validate - detects credential leaks (Stripe keys, AWS keys)
POST /api/autonomous/sandbox/execute - blocks dangerous code (rm -rf, sudo) with blocked=true
POST /api/autonomous/sandbox/execute - blocks embedded credentials with blocked=true
POST /api/autonomous/sandbox/run-tests/{id} - runs test files in project
POST /api/autonomous/validate-loop - runs test-gen -> execute -> debug cycle
GET /api/autonomous/snapshots/{id} - lists snapshots with include_auto param
GET /api/autonomous/snapshots/{id}/diff/{snap_id} - diffs snapshot vs current state
POST /api/autonomous/context/rank/{id} - ranks files by relevance using TF-IDF
POST /api/autonomous/context/prune/{id} - prunes files to fit token budget
GET /api/autonomous/deps/{id} - builds dependency graph with imports/dependents maps
POST /api/autonomous/deps/{id}/affected - finds affected files by change
POST /api/autonomous/feedback - accepts project_id, type, comment, agent fields
GET /api/autonomous/feedback/stats - returns aggregated stats (total, avg_rating, distribution)
Sandbox credit deduction - credits_used incremented after execution
402 response format - insufficient credits returns proper detail message
429 response format - rate limit returns proper detail message
All autonomous endpoints require authentication (401/403 without token)
critical_code_review_comments: All 7 autonomous modules properly wired to routes under /api/autonomous/* prefix
Guardrails detects 3 issue types: lazy_code (warning), credential_leak (critical), hallucinated_library (error)
Sandbox uses subprocess execution with security checks via AISecurity.validate_prompt()
Sandbox blocks dangerous patterns (rm -rf, sudo, shutdown, etc.) and embedded credentials
Validation loop calls xAI API in demo mode - returns demo content when XAI_API_KEY not set
Snapshot manager creates pre-op snapshots, supports rollback with auto-save of current state
Context pruning uses TF-IDF scoring for file relevance ranking
Dependency graph maps imports and finds downstream affected files
Feedback collector stores ratings 1-5 with aggregation stats
Rate limiting enforced via _enforce() helper on sandbox/validate-loop endpoints
Credit deduction working - sandbox_execution costs 4 credits
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user from iteration 17/18
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified Phase 3 - all 7 autonomous AI modules wired to routes. 18 endpoints under /api/autonomous/* all working. MOCKED: AI generation in demo mode (XAI_API_KEY not set), JengaHQ payment in demo mode (JENGA_API_KEY not set). Project creation does NOT accept files directly - must use PUT /api/projects/{id}/files after creation. Sandbox execution costs 4 credits per call.

mocked_features.AI generation: Demo mode when XAI_API_KEY not set - validation_loop returns demo content
mocked_features.JengaHQ payment: Demo mode when JENGA_API_KEY not set - auto-activates subscriptions
